---
name: Issue Report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: Issue with [GUIDE]
labels: guide content
assignees: ''

---

**Locate the issue**
State which guide it's in, and what section/subsection the issue is at. Then, quote the text / specify the image/video with an issue.

**Describe the issue**
A clear and concise description of what the issue is. 

**Why this matters**
A clear explanation of why this content is wrong and what should be changed about it.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
